query: I need a hospital near Patna for an emergency C-section

recommendation.name: Al-Shifa Surgical & Maternity Hospital
recommendation.reason: Surgical and maternity hospital with consistent data. Dedicated maternity services.

reasoning.text: Forty-seven facilities in Bihar claim obstetric or gynecology services. Checking each one.
Narrowing to hospitals with trust score above 0.5 near the Patna area...
Claims obstetric services but lists zero doctors and zero equipment. A hospital with no doctors on record cannot safely deliver a baby, let alone perform a C-section.
⚠ Sarthak Medical Hall also appeared in results — this is a pharmacy. It should not appear in obstetric searches but it lists medical specialties. Ignoring.
✓ Al-Shifa Surgical & Maternity Hospital in Bihar Sharif. Dedicated surgical and maternity facility. Trust: 0.9.
For a woman in labor with complications, being sent to a hospital with zero doctors means losing time she does not have. Al-Shifa is the safest call.

warnings.name: Shree Pradhan Hospital
warnings.reason: Claims obstetric services but lists 0 doctors and 0 equipment
